violations.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
violations.help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

nodes.html: <input aria-label="Søk" auto-complete="off" class="_input_xqf44_20 button-label-large" name="q" placeholder="Søk" required="" type="search">
nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.83 (foreground color: #f1bfbf, background color: #c50000, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

violations.description: Ensure table headers have discernible text
violations.help: Table header text should not be empty

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:

violations.description: Ensure the complementary landmark or aside is at top level
violations.help: Aside should not be contained in another landmark

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  The null landmark is contained in another landmark.

violations.description: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks

violations.description: Ensure <svg> elements with an img, graphics-document or graphics-symbol role have accessible text
violations.help: <svg> elements with an img role must have alternative text
